source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 今起多地高考成绩陆续公布
topics.official_english: College entrance exam results released in multiple regions
topics.why_hot: Annual high-stakes event affecting millions of students and families; results determine university admissions.
topics.share_angle: Explain the gaokao system, its importance, and how results are used for admissions.

topics.chinese_topic: 重磅举措发布 让外资“不见外”
topics.official_english: Major measures announced to make foreign investment feel at home
topics.why_hot: New policies to attract foreign investment signal China's economic openness and impact global business.
topics.share_angle: Break down the new measures and what they mean for foreign companies in China.

topics.chinese_topic: 国际金价“高台跳水” 金饰价格降了
topics.official_english: International gold prices plunge, jewelry prices drop
topics.why_hot: Gold price volatility affects investors and consumers; price drop sparks buying interest.
topics.share_angle: Explain reasons behind gold price drop and its impact on consumers and investors.

topics.chinese_topic: 世界杯首个爆款竟然是根头绳
topics.official_english: World Cup's first viral hit is a hair tie
topics.why_hot: Unexpected cultural phenomenon during World Cup; combines sports, fashion, and social media.
topics.share_angle: How a simple hair tie became a symbol of the World Cup and what it says about fan culture.

topics.why_hot: Mbappé's spectacular goal highlights World Cup excitement and his star power.
topics.share_angle: Showcase the goal and discuss Mbappé's impact on the tournament.

topics.chinese_topic: 充电宝打火机车钥匙都成偷拍利器了
topics.official_english: Power banks, lighters, car keys become tools for covert filming
topics.why_hot: Privacy concerns as everyday objects are weaponized for voyeurism; sparks public debate on surveillance.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the rise of hidden cameras and how to protect personal privacy in public spaces.

topics.chinese_topic: 男子16万多购入路虎 购置税或翻倍
topics.official_english: Man buys Land Rover for 160,000 yuan, purchase tax may double
topics.why_hot: Tax policy confusion and consumer rights issue; highlights complexity of vehicle taxation.
topics.share_angle: Explain how vehicle purchase tax works and what consumers should watch out for.

topics.chinese_topic: 南华禅寺辟谣“售卖祈福套餐”
topics.official_english: Nanhua Temple denies selling prayer packages
topics.why_hot: Religious institution refutes commercial exploitation rumors; touches on faith and consumerism.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the balance between religious practice and commercialization in China.
